title: gut orbits, pitting orbit against orbit
author: joshualinog
excerpt: If you stare and focus at your feet your eyes will never see the beauty of the stars. Is this small parable regarding setting higher orbits i.e.the eyes being focused and set on low orbits i.e. the fe
content:
If you stare and focus at your feet your eyes will never see the beauty of the stars. Is this small parable regarding setting higher orbits i.e.the eyes being focused and set on low orbits i.e. the feet?

# over-engagement of a lower orbit in a given space removes capacity of that space to engage in a higher orbit

## mapping the orbits of the gut


## list attempt
- satisfaction (hours)
- beauty
